subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us, and We have hearkened unto thy call unto God, the Lord of the worlds, and We respond unto thee through this Tablet which diffuseth its fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و اسمعنا ما نادیت به الله رب العالمین و اجبناک بهذا اللوح الذی تضوع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
